_README: Verified public-records channels per government, consumed by foia_lead_spotter.py. RULE: never add or edit an entry from memory or a search-result snippet — every email/URL here must have been seen verbatim on the cited official page. Verified 2026-07-22; four CivicPlus sites (Tucson, TPD, Marana, Oro Valley, South Tucson) block non-browser clients, so those were confirmed via Wayback snapshots of the exact official URL (snapshot date in notes). Re-check Oro Valley and South Tucson in a live browser before first use — their snapshots are the oldest (early 2025).

City of Tucson.notes: Preferred channel is the online form linked from that page (Hyland OnBase — tokenized URL, enter via the page, don't bookmark the form URL). cot-prr@tucsonaz.gov is the records-request email; cityclerk@tucsonaz.gov is general clerk business. Mail: Attn: Public Records, P.O. Box 27210, Tucson, AZ 85726-7210. Phone (520) 791-4213. Verified via Wayback 2026-01-13.

Tucson Police Department.notes: Download the TPD records-request form PDF from the page, fill it, email it — no portal. Mail: Records Section, 270 S Stone Ave, Tucson, AZ 85701-1917; phone (520) 791-4462. Body-worn camera video: $44.00 per video hour reviewed. Collision reports are separate (Crashdocs). Verified via Wayback 2026-01-13.

Rio Nuevo Multipurpose Facilities Distri.office: Rio Nuevo District — Dan Meyers, Chief Financial Officer
Rio Nuevo Multipurpose Facilities Distri.notes: State-appointed multipurpose facilities district (downtown TIF) — a public body subject to A.R.S. § 39-121, but publishes no records officer or request instructions. For financial/disbursement records CC the CFO, Dan Meyers, danielm@rionuevo-tucson.org (note the different rionuevo-tucson.org domain, as printed on their staff page). Address 1703 E. Broadway Blvd, Tucson AZ 85719; phone (520) 623-7336 (office by appointment). No records portal — expect to follow up by phone. Verified live 2026-07-22.

Pima County Attorney's Office.office: Pima County Attorney's Office — Public Records
Pima County Attorney's Office.notes: PCAO runs its own NextRequest portal, separate from the county's GovQA. Route anything prosecutorial here (charging decisions, plea files, OIS reviews) — the Clerk of the Board will just bounce it. Expect work-product and pending-investigation withholdings on open cases; a denial with a stated exemption is still a story fact. Noted on the county public-records page, verified live 2026-07-22.

Pima County.office: Clerk of the Board of Supervisors
Pima County.notes: GovQA portal, account required; all correspondence happens inside the portal. NOTE: the Pima County Attorney's Office runs its OWN separate NextRequest portal (pcao.pima.gov/public-records-request-new/) and courts have separate channels — this entry is county administrative records only. Verified live 2026-07-22.

Town of Marana.notes: SeamlessDocs form. Police records are separate: mpdrecords@maranaaz.gov / form marana.seamlessdocs.com/f/MPDPRR / (520) 382-2000. Court records: marana.seamlessdocs.com/f/courtpr. Self-serve archive 1977–present: archiverecords.maranaaz.gov. clerk@maranaaz.gov circulates online but is NOT on the official records page — excluded. Verified via Wayback 2025-11-17.

Town of Oro Valley.notes: Destiny Hosted form — click the 'General' button. Police records go through the separate OVPD Records Unit channel per the Clerk page. Fees per Administrative Directive #5. Verified via Wayback 2025-02-18 — OLDEST snapshot here, re-check live in a browser before first use.

City of South Tucson.notes: Small city, no email and no portal published: downloadable PDF 'Public Records Request Form' (separate police-records PDFs in English/Spanish), submitted in person or by mail to City Hall, 1601 S Sixth Ave, South Tucson, AZ 85713. Phone (520) 792-2424, M–F 8–5. A phone call first is the practical unlock. Verified via Wayback 2025-02/03 snapshots — re-check live before first use.

Pima County Sheriff's Department.notes: Complete the request form and email it, or use the online form on the page. Mail: Attn: Records Maintenance, 1650 E. Benson Hwy, Suite C, Tucson, AZ 85714-1758; (520) 351-4650, 8:30–3:30. Requires commercial/non-commercial designation per A.R.S. § 39-121.03(A). Body-cam $46/video-hour reviewed; reports $5 minimum. Verified live 2026-07-22.

University of Arizona.notes: NextRequest portal; office email publicrecords@arizona.edu, (520) 621-1986. UAPD police records are SEPARATE: records2@email.arizona.edu, (520) 621-7536, PDF form on uapd.arizona.edu/services/public-records-request. UAPD BWC: $23 per half-hour of footage. Verified live 2026-07-22.
